resources.name: Ore

best_locations.area: Verdant Brook — elevated peak NE of Sealed Realm of the Guardian ('unraidable ore peak')
best_locations.notes: Cluster of ~8 Ore nodes on a summit raids cannot path to; sources also count ~6 Coal here (see Coal). Classic meta 'ore base' / 1.0-confirmed best all-round base. Coordinates cited variously as (189, -37)/(190, -41)/(192, -37) — same spot.

best_locations.area: Verdant Brook — dedicated ore mine plateau
best_locations.notes: ~8 Ore nodes, dedicated mining outpost (nexttier 1.0 guide). Adjacent plateau (270, -215) adds ~6 Coal for an all-in-one Refined Ingot base.
Early-game pure-ore spot, enemies lvl 2-10; cramped (many trees/nodes, little build room). One 1.0 guide cites this spot as (-256, -120) — coordinate conflict, see gaps. (pre-1.0 guide)
Classic early ore spot; ore + wood only. (pre-1.0 guide)
Huge flat open area + many ore nodes; best 'big main base with ore' compromise. (pre-1.0 guide)
Flat, spacious; ore + wood, sulfur deposits nearby. (pre-1.0 guide)

resources.base_recommendation: Yes — the classic dedicated 'ore base' is still meta in 1.0. Top pick: Verdant Brook peak (190, -40) — unraidable, ore+coal together (Refined Ingots on site). Early game: SW of Small Settlement (8, -528) or behind Desolate Church. From ~Lv 20+ the placeable Ore Mining Site (and later improved mining sites) can supply a main base without a dedicated ore base, but node clusters remain faster for bulk.

resources.name: Coal

best_locations.area: Verdant Brook peak / Sealed Realm of the Guardian
best_locations.notes: Shockbyte counts 8 coal nodes at (190, -41) and 6 coal + 8 ore at (189, -37) — same summit cluster. Best coal+ore combo base in the game.
6 coal nodes.

best_locations.area: Twilight Dunes desert (west spot, near Anubis alpha arena)
best_locations.notes: Heat protection needed. (pre-1.0 guide)

best_locations.area: Twilight Dunes desert (southeast spot, near coast)
best_locations.notes: Heat protection needed. (pre-1.0 guide)
6 coal nodes clustered; volcanic biome, heat armor required. (pre-1.0 guide)
9 coal + 3 ore nodes — biggest pure-coal cluster; extreme heat/cold cycle. (pre-1.0 guide)

resources.base_recommendation: Yes — the classic 'coal+ore base' at the Verdant Brook peak (190, -40) is the single best resource base: both Refined Ingot inputs on one unraidable summit. Alternative pure-coal outpost: north of Duneshelter (327, 485) with 9 nodes. Coal Mine placeable EXISTS: tech 37 (paldb, Structures index 2026-07-15) - automates coal at any base mid-game.

resources.name: Pure Quartz

best_locations.notes: Flat field, ~half a dozen dense nodes near the fast travel point; easiest quartz run. (pre-1.0 guide)

best_locations.area: Astral Mountains — below PAL Genetic Research Unit Tower Entrance
best_locations.notes: Cluster of rich veins along rocky ridges below tower entrance. (pre-1.0 guide)

best_locations.area: Astral Mountains — Land of Absolute Zero
best_locations.notes: High-altitude cliffside patch, 4-6 deposits; aggressive high-level wildlife, max cold protection. (pre-1.0 guide)
Quartz chunk near an ore node a few meters from the travel point. (pre-1.0 guide)

resources.base_recommendation: Optional. Classic 'quartz base' = Pristine Snow Field (-213, 250): flat, nodes at the door, fast travel adjacent. But since Feybreak the placeable Pure Quartz Mine (costs 100 Pure Quartz to build) automates it at any base — hand-mine the first ~100 in the Astral Mountains, then automate. Mining Lv 3 Pals + cold-resistant gear required in the biome.

resources.name: Sulfur

best_locations.area: Mount Obsidian — next to Tower of the Brothers of the Eternal Pyre
best_locations.notes: 8 sulfur nodes along the edge of a lava pool drop-off; fast travel at the tower. (pre-1.0 guide)
Up to 9 tightly packed nodes at the caldera; fast travel point nearby. (pre-1.0 guide)

best_locations.area: Mount Obsidian — south of Midpoint fast travel
best_locations.notes: 6 sulfur + 2 ore nodes. (pre-1.0 guide)

best_locations.area: Mount Obsidian — western slopes lava field
best_locations.notes: 7 nodes clustered (+2 farther out); nexttier's 1.0 pick for a mass-Gunpowder base ('deep sulfur pools, harsh heat').

best_locations.area: North of Beach of Everlasting Summer
best_locations.notes: 7 nodes between two lava pools + 1 upper pool + 1 far side. (pre-1.0 guide)

resources.base_recommendation: Yes for ammo-heavy endgame — classic 'sulfur base' on Mount Obsidian west slopes (-435, -530) or by the Eternal Pyre tower (-595, -520). Needs full heat protection; fire-immune workers (Blazamut etc.) ideal. Sulfur Mine placeable (Ancient Tech, Lv 52, 5 AT points) later automates it anywhere.

resources.name: Paldium Fragment

best_locations.notes: Starter spot: paldium + stone + wood, temperate, low-level enemies. (pre-1.0 guide)
Larger than the northern spot; paldium + ore deposits; next to a mineable dungeon. (pre-1.0 guide)
Blue-veined rocks concentrate near water; the cliffs west of the starting beach hold 20+ deposits on a ~5-min loop, ~15-min respawn.

resources.base_recommendation: No dedicated base needed. Any base with a Crusher (Lv 8, needs Watering Pal) converts Stone -> Paldium Fragments indefinitely; Refrigerated Crusher (Lv 52) scales it up. Early game just mine blue rocks near rivers/coasts around the Plateau of Beginnings.
other_sources: random drop from mining ordinary rocks

resources.name: Crude Oil

best_locations.notes: Large flat area over an oil field — nexttier's 1.0 pick as 'the definitive Crude Oil base'; mushrooms nearby for food.
Oil patches + multi-resource production. (pre-1.0 guide)
Oil + additional resources. (pre-1.0 guide)
2 oil field spots + 7 coal nodes — oil+coal combo base. (pre-1.0 guide)

best_locations.area: Oil Rig Stronghold (Lv 55, southeast ocean, SE of Marsh Island)
best_locations.notes: Raid target, not a base: ~200 Crude Oil per clear from the large yellow chest (random spot per in-game day) + thug drops; anti-air missiles — approach by water/low. nexttier cites the zone as roughly (540-580, -420 to -430).

resources.base_recommendation: Yes — endgame 'oil base': claim an oil field on Sakurajima (best: -646, 270), place Oil Extractors on the patches, power with generators + Electricity Pals (Orserk fastest). Supplement with Oil Rig raids (Lv 30 starter barge near spawn; Lv 50+ Stronghold and Rayne Syndicate Platform; in 1.0 rig-controlled enemy Pals are capturable).
other_sources: drops: Syndicate thugs, Sootseer, Kikit, Maraith

resources.name: Chromite

best_locations.area: Feybreak Island — red zones (marked on map)
best_locations.notes: Buried — requires Metal Detector (30 Plasteel, 100 Paldium Fragment, 30 Circuit Board, 20 Nightstar Sand @ Production Assembly Line II) or Smokie's partner skill (Dark Pal, northern Feybreak). (pre-1.0 guide)

best_locations.area: Feybreak — cave with recurring Chromite nodes
best_locations.notes: Most-cited reliable spawn: cave consistently spawns multiple Chromite nodes. (pre-1.0 guide)

best_locations.area: Feybreak — the four Alpha Pal arenas
best_locations.notes: Each alpha location typically hosts multiple Chromite nodes — run them as a circuit. (pre-1.0 guide)

resources.base_recommendation: No classic base — Chromite is detector-based, so it's a farming circuit, not a node camp. Base on Feybreak near the red zones only if smelting on site (Gigantic Furnace: 5 Chromite + 12 Hexolite Quartz + 20 Ore -> 1 Hexolite).
other_sources: Metal Detector digs in red zones

resources.name: Hexolite Quartz

best_locations.notes: Dense Hexolite Quartz node field; input for Hexolite (Tech Lv 56, Gigantic Furnace). (pre-1.0 guide)

resources.base_recommendation: Optional Feybreak outpost near (-1066, -1430) if mass-producing Hexolite gear; otherwise haul to main base.

resources.name: Ancient Civilization Parts

best_locations.notes: Every field Alpha drops them and respawns — farm the same low-level alpha repeatedly.

best_locations.area: Dungeons on the starter island (~Lv 13 dungeons)
best_locations.notes: Dungeon bosses + rare chests; a dozen dungeons cycle near the first island — easiest early farm.

resources.base_recommendation: Not a base resource — farmed from bosses/dungeons/expeditions.

resources.name: Ancient Civilization Relic

best_locations.notes: Drops from Pals defeated inside the World Tree; also from hard-mode tower bosses, fishing and locked chests in the zone. Recycle stacks in the Ancient Relic Recycler at base for a steady supply of every World Tree material. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

best_locations.area: Pal Expedition: The World Tree's Forbidden Area
best_locations.notes: Expedition Station mission returns Ancient Relics passively. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

resources.base_recommendation: No base — combat/expedition loot. Build the Ancient Relic Recycler at your main base and feed it relics.

resources.name: Paloxite

best_locations.area: World Tree — center, by the giant orange crystal
best_locations.notes: Two clusters: one directly in front of the giant orange crystal, one slightly west. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

best_locations.area: World Tree — near Remnant Riverside fast travel
best_locations.notes: 5 nodes close together in a relatively safe area — best loop: fast travel, mine, deposit. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

best_locations.area: World Tree — near Gilded City Ruins Watchtower fast travel
best_locations.notes: 3 nodes close together + 2 more at varying heights nearby — bring a flying mount. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

resources.base_recommendation: No conventional base inside the World Tree — it's an instanced endgame zone (Lv 75+ enemies, radiation pockets requiring Gas Mask). Farm loops from fast travel points. CRITICAL: Paloxite (like other World Tree gatherables) vanishes on approach unless you apply World Tree Holy Water to yourself AND your active Pal, or run a Pal with the Dimensional Leap passive (from Large Ominous Eggs in the zone) which negates vanishing. Mine with Plasma Multicutter; smelt into Paloxite Ingots for top-tier gear/structures.

resources.name: Radiant Gems

best_locations.notes: Elemental drops gathered throughout the World Tree's biomes; radiation sub-zone needs Gas Mask. Bundle gem runs with Paloxite + Mythical Wood farming; Teafant Spring statues heal between fights. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

resources.base_recommendation: No base — exploration loop. Combine element-matched Radiant Gems into Awakening Gems, then use on a same-element Pal to unlock its Awakening stat boost (1.0 endgame progression).

resources.name: Soralite

best_locations.notes: Soralite nodes on an open ridge — nexttier's 1.0 base pick for the material. Appears as huge boulders ringed by small blue crystals; mine with Plasma Multicutter. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)
Sunreach-exclusive; smelted into Soralite Ingots for advanced 1.0 equipment/weapons. Sunreach unlocks after beating Bjorn & Bastigor at Feybreak Tower. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

resources.base_recommendation: Worth a small Sunreach outpost at the (583, 144) ridge cluster if crafting Soralite-tier gear in bulk. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

resources.name: Mythical Wood

best_locations.area: World Tree — glowing trees throughout the zone
best_locations.notes: Same vanish-on-approach rule as Paloxite: needs World Tree Holy Water buff or a Dimensional Leap Pal. Used with Paloxite for endgame gear like the Wing Pack. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

resources.base_recommendation: No base — farm during Paloxite/Radiant Gem loops.

resources.name: World Tree Holy Water

best_locations.notes: Consumable that lets you collect World Tree materials for a short time; drop farming is slow — the Dimensional Leap passive (Pals from Large Ominous Eggs in the zone) is the long-term replacement. (PRELIMINARY 1.0)

resources.base_recommendation: No base. Also an ingredient in Nutrient (25 Holy Water + 18 Caramel Cotton Candy + 20 Onion + 10 Cavern Mushroom).

resources.name: Skill Fruit

best_locations.notes: Skill Fruit tree; 3 fruits per tree, respawn over time. (pre-1.0 guide)

resources.base_recommendation: No base — 17 trees on the Palpagos Islands (TheGamer list above); a Steam community map counts 28 total including Sakurajima and Feybreak trees. Higher-level zones bear better fruits. Also drop from Oil Rig small chests and Wandering Merchants.
other_sources: Skillfruit Orchard (late placeable, per community guides)

resources.name: Coralum Ore

best_locations.area: Late-game water fishing zones - salvage with Fishing Magnet / Powerful Fishing Magnet
best_locations.notes: x1-2 per salvage at 30% - fastest method. Magnets craft x10 per batch (Fishing Magnet: 1 Ingot). Jellroy partner skill boosts salvage loot.

resources.base_recommendation: No mineable nodes - it's a fishing/drop resource. Farm loop: fishing spot + stack of magnets.

notes: Coordinate convention: in-game map (x, y) as shown at screen bottom.

EA-era node spots are mostly unchanged in 1.0; 1.0-updated guides (nexttier, xgamingserver) confirm the Verdant Brook ore/coal peak and Mount Obsidian sulfur fields still hold. Entries verified only in EA-era guides are tagged (pre-1.0 guide).

Placeable mines change the meta late-game: Ore Mining Site (early), Coal Mine (~Lv 53), Sulfur Mine (Lv 52), Pure Quartz Mine (costs 100 Pure Quartz) — a maxed main base can self-supply everything except Crude Oil (needs oil-field patches) and World Tree materials.

World Tree gather rule (1.0): Paloxite/Mythical Wood/Radiant Gems/Ancient Relics vanish on approach unless buffed with World Tree Holy Water (self + active Pal) or accompanied by a Pal with the Dimensional Leap passive (hatch Large Ominous Eggs found in the zone).
World Tree access: complete Sunreach (unlocked by beating Bjorn & Bastigor at Feybreak Tower, then disabling six defense modules).
Oil Rigs in 1.0: three rigs (starter barge ~Lv 30 near spawn; Lv 50+ Stronghold at ~(608, -435) SE of Marsh Island; Rayne Syndicate Platform Lv 50+); 1.0 lets you capture rig-controlled enemy Pals.
2026-07-14: Coralum Ore entry added - salvage route user-verified in-game, confirmed against paldb Powerful_Fishing_Magnet loot table.
2026-07-15: Coal Mine подтверждена (tech 37); предыдущая правка о её отсутствии была ошибкой поиска.
gaps: Coordinate conflict for the 'behind Desolate Church' ore spot: (72, -400) (ScalaCube) vs (-256, -120) (drawpie/xmodhub 1.0 roundups) — not reconciled; the (72, -400) figure matches the church's actual position on the starter island.

ScalaCube lists a Sakurajima-East oil spot at (512, 171), which falls outside Sakurajima's map bounds (island is at negative X) — likely an error or a different island; kept out of the JSON locations.
No numeric coordinates published yet for World Tree Paloxite/Radiant Gem spots — sources give fast-travel-relative directions only (zone may use its own sub-map).
Exact Radiant Gem counts per Awakening Gem not published in accessible sources.
Sunreach 'Crystal Pool' base spot cited at (-540, -1361) by nexttier — coordinate plane unverified (overlaps Feybreak range); excluded pending confirmation.
Feybreak Chromite red-zone map exists on game8/wiki but those sites are bot-blocked from this machine; only the (-1200, -1100) cave and alpha arenas captured.
Skill Fruit tree list covers the 17 base-map trees only; the 28-tree list (incl. Sakurajima/Feybreak) is in a Steam Community guide image not parsed here.
Mount Obsidian summit sulfur cluster (9 nodes) — no numeric coordinates in sources.
